text: Control valves of a CO2 system may be located within the protected space when:

options.text: an automatic heat-sensing trip is installed
the CO2 cylinders are also in the space
there is also a control valve outside
it is impractical to locate them outside

explanation: Control valves for CO2 systems in protected spaces are typically located outside. However, if impractical, they may be located inside provided a secondary control valve is also present externally for safe manual operation during an emergency.
